title: The Problem with AI Agents No One is Talking About | Yutori, Abhishek Das
summary: Abhishek Das, co-founder of Yutori, argues that most AI agents don't work reliably because errors compound across multi-step workflows. He contends the agent industry has normalized failure and emphasizes that reliability matters more than raw performance metrics for production agents.
